title: thlaspi lerescheanum
intro: Thlaspi lerescheanum, also known as Leresche's pepperwort, is a rare and annual plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its small, white flowers and narrow leaves. It is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and acting as an expectorant to help clear mucus from the lungs. Thlaspi lerescheanum can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and salves, although its usage and availability are limited due to its rarity.
